description.p: You have been chosen to represent the Fire God on the material plane, carrying their divine fire and wielding their blessing.

Fiery Aura. Your body emits small, harmless flames. You can reduce their intensity to almost imperceptible or increase them to shine like a torch, emitting bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet. You are immune to fire damage.

Incandescent. When you make a spell attack or weapon attack that deals fire damage, you add your proficiency bonus to the damage roll. Additionally, when you cast a spell that deals fire damage and requires a saving throw, add your proficiency bonus to the spell save DC.

Uncontrolled Flame. If you haven't cast a spell that deals fire damage on your turn, you can use your bonus action to cast a fire based cantrip of your choice a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per day.

sheet.description: Your body emits harmless flames (bright 20 ft, dim 20 ft additional). You're immune to fire. Add Prof. Bonus to fire damage rolls and fire spell DCs. You can cast a fire cantrip if you haven't cast one this turn (uses: {{proficiency}} charges per day).
